## Agent

ChatGPT / Claude / author

## Purpose

What this change is trying to accomplish.

## Files changed

List each file and why it was touched.

## Uncertainty

Claims, interpretations, or design choices that still require judgment.

## Boundary check

- [ ] No publishable essay prose was written by an agent.
- [ ] No changes were made to `shared/reviewed.md` by an agent.
- [ ] No changes were made to another agent's scratchbook.
- [ ] Vocabulary was not changed without explicit author instruction.
- [ ] Conceptual contributions remain quarantined in the agent scratchbook.
- [ ] Essay notes contain only logistics, author-decided structure, open questions, or references to scratchbook entries.

## Files deliberately left untouched

State the relevant files that were reviewed but not modified.

## Author action required

What the author must review, decide, reconstruct, verify, or reject.
